**Governing Artifacts** | **Active Feature**: Shell v1 Remediation | **Date**: 2026-04-26

Canonical precedence order: `constitution > spec > plan > tasks`

1. **Constitution** (highest precedence): `.specify/memory/constitution.md`
2. **Specification**: `specs/001-remediate-shell-v1/spec.md`
